title: caragana zaissanica
intro: Caragana zaissanica, also known as Zaiss's caragana, is a small shrub belonging to the pea family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Caragana zaissanica is often used as a tea or infusion, and its dried roots and leaves can be used to make a tincture or decoction.
